name: Chocolate Rich'n Creamy Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease or spray Pam in a 13x9x2-inch pan. Set aside.
3. FOR BASE, combine cake mix, 2 eggs, butter, milk and nuts in a large bowl. Mix well until just moistened. Spread evenly in pan.
4. FOR TOPPING, beat cream cheese in a large bowl at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth. Beat in 2 eggs, sugar, and vanilla until smooth. Spread evenly over base.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes. Edges and top will be light golden brown and will have a slightly shiny appearance. Cool completely. Cut into squares. This recipe makes about 2 dozen bars.
